comments.body: We already call `getprivatebroadcastinfo()` here for the `tx_originator`, so we can assert it's `True` here instead of duplicating the call for it below.

Why not just `enabled`? The RPC is already `getprivatebroadcast`?

```suggestion
                {RPCResult::Type::BOOL, "enabled", "If -privatebroadcast is set"},
```
